message:
🌱 Add vllm: [New Model]: support minimax-01 mission (#847)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "vllm-12073-new-model-support-minimax-01",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "vllm: Support MiniMax-01 model",
+    "description": "Add support for the MiniMax-01 family of models (MiniMax-Text-01 and MiniMax-VL-01) in vLLM. MiniMax-VL-01 is a multimodal vision-language model using the ViT-MLP-LLM architecture. Requested by 38+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current vLLM setup",
+        "description": "Verify your vLLM version and configuration:\n```bash\npip show vllm | grep Version\n# or\npython -c \"import vllm; print(vllm.__version__)\"\n```\nMiniMax-01 support requires a recent version of vLLM with the model architecture registered."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Download the MiniMax-01 model",
+        "description": "The MiniMax-01 models are available on HuggingFace:\n- Text-only: [MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-Text-01](https://huggingface.co/MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-Text-01)\n- Vision-Language: [MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-VL-01](https://huggingface.co/MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-VL-01)\n\nThe VL model uses a ViT-MLP-LLM framework common in multimodal large language models."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Serve MiniMax-01 with vLLM",
+        "description": "Start the vLLM server with the MiniMax-01 model:\n```bash\n# For text-only model\npython -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \\\n  --model MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-Text-01\n\n# For vision-language model\npython -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \\\n  --model MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-VL-01\n```\nNote: These are large models and require significant GPU memory."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify MiniMax-01 inference works",
+        "description": "Test that MiniMax-01 model serving is working:\n```bash\ncurl http://localhost:8000/v1/chat/completions \\\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n  -d '{\"model\": \"MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-Text-01\", \"messages\": [{\"role\": \"user\", \"content\": \"Hello!\"}], \"max_tokens\": 50}'\n```\nYou should receive a valid chat completion response from the MiniMax-01 model."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "vLLM added support for the MiniMax-01 family of models including MiniMax-Text-01 and MiniMax-VL-01. The vision-language model uses the ViT-MLP-LLM framework with a custom image processor. This enables high-throughput serving of MiniMax models through vLLM's inference engine.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "# Serve MiniMax-Text-01\npython -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server --model MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-Text-01",
+        "# Serve MiniMax-VL-01 (vision-language)\npython -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server --model MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-VL-01"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "vllm",
+      "community",
+      "llm-serving",
+      "feature",
+      "minimax",
+      "multimodal",
+      "vision-language"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "vllm"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/12073",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/16328"
+    },
+    "reactions": 38,
+    "comments": 1,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "python",
+      "pip"
+    ],
+    "description": "Python 3.8+, pip, a CUDA-capable GPU with sufficient VRAM, and a working vLLM installation (pip install vllm)."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:45:04.298Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
